title: 60-Second Lead Response for Real Estate
metaDescription: Answer every real estate lead in under 60 seconds, in your voice, with your booking link. Done-for-you speed to lead by Ayothedoc.
excerpt: Every new buyer or seller inquiry gets a personal reply in under 60 seconds, in your voice, with your booking link. Installed and run for you.

sections.intro:
In real estate, the first agent to reply usually wins the showing. Buyers and sellers fill out forms on multiple sites, then go with whoever answers first. If a lead waits 10 minutes, you are often already out of the running. If they wait an hour, the conversation has moved to a competitor.

The 60-Second Lead Engine is the wedge offer of the Ayothedoc AI Operating System. It is a done-for-you Capability that watches your lead sources, drafts a reply in your voice, includes your booking link, and sends it in under 60 seconds, day or night. You stay the agent of record. The system just makes sure no lead sits cold while you are at a closing or a showing.
sections.fourCFit:
This page covers the Capabilities layer of your AIOS. It is one of the four layers we install and run for you:

  • Context: your listings focus, geography, price points, voice, and how you talk to buyers vs sellers.
  • Connections: your inbox, CRM, calendar, and the portals and forms where leads come in.
  • Capabilities: the 60-second reply itself, plus routing, tagging, and follow-up drafts.
  • Cadence: nudges at hour 1, day 1, day 3, and day 7 if the lead has not booked.

The wedge starts with one Capability so you can see it work before we expand the system.
sections.whatDoneLooksLike:
When the engine is live, here is the artifact you get and the service level we hold ourselves to:

  • A reply sent to every new lead in under 60 seconds, 24/7.
  • Replies written in your voice, referencing the property or area the lead asked about.
  • Your live calendar booking link included, with showing slots that match your real availability.
  • The lead logged in your CRM with source, property of interest, and tag (buyer, seller, renter, investor).
  • A short brief in your inbox each morning showing every lead from the last 24 hours, who replied, and who booked.
  • A weekly report on response time, booking rate, and source quality.
sections.howWeInstall:
We install and run this for you in three phases.

  1. Audit (free, about 10 minutes): we map your lead sources, current response time, and tools. Run the audit.
  2. Install (10 business days): we connect your inbox, CRM, and calendar, write your reply templates in your voice, set routing rules for buyers vs sellers, and test against real leads before going live.
  3. Operate (ongoing): we monitor every reply, tune the voice and templates, and add one new automation per week. You own the system. We run it. See plans.
sections.expectedResults:
Based on what we see across real estate clients on the wedge, expect ranges like these in the first 60 days:

  • Median first response time drops from 30 to 240 minutes down to under 60 seconds.
  • Lead-to-booked-call rate improves by 20 to 60 percent, especially on after-hours and weekend leads.
  • 10 to 25 hours a month given back to you on inbox triage and follow-up drafting.
  • Cleaner CRM data because every lead is tagged and logged at intake, not days later.

Our standing guarantee across the full AIOS: recover 40 or more hours a month or we keep working free until you do.
sections.faq:
Will the replies sound like me or like a bot?

They sound like you. During install we capture how you actually talk to buyers and sellers, including phrases you use and ones you avoid. You approve the templates before anything goes live, and we tune them based on real replies in the first two weeks.

What happens if a lead replies back outside business hours?

The engine handles the first reply and the booking link instantly. If the lead writes back with questions, the system drafts a follow-up and either sends it within your rules or holds it for your review in the morning. You decide where the line sits.

Do I have to change CRMs or portals?

No. We are tool-agnostic and work with what you already use for your inbox, CRM, calendar, and lead sources. If something in your stack is genuinely blocking speed to lead, we will tell you, but we will not push you to switch for the sake of it.
